name: design-system-plugin
description: Generate Sanofi Elements compliant HTML prototypes from captured design-system assets.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and validate Sanofi Elements HTML prototypes from local design-system assets.
interface.longDescription: A local-first Sanofi Elements design-system package for turning Storybook-first knowledge, tokens, component contracts, business page profiles, patterns, templates, rules, and Cursor workflow guidance into validated HTML prototypes.
defaultPrompt: Use the local Sanofi Elements design-system registry before selecting component sources.
Generate an admin or business HTML prototype from the matched page profile, template, and rules.
Validate the generated prototype with scripts/sanofi-ds and write reports under outputs/reports.
For Cursor usage, follow .cursor/rules/sanofi-design-system.mdc and prefer design-system-plugin/scripts/sanofi-ds as the toolkit entrypoint.
